engine_metadata.purpose: Automated Narrative to Visual Pipeline Conversion

scene_breakdown_logic.pacing_modifier: Slow for tension, Fast for action/confrontation

nostalgia.camera: Slow Dolly, Shallow Depth of Field

master_video_prompt.structure: Camera movement: [CAMERA_MOVEMENT]. Subject action: [ACTION_DETAILS]. Atmosphere: [MOOD_DESC]. Lighting: [LIGHTING_TYPE]. High quality, smooth motion, consistent character.

motion_presets.static_tension: Subtle breathing movement, slight head turn, eyes shifting
motion_presets.dynamic_walk: Steady walking pace, fabric moving with wind, background parallax
motion_presets.intense_confrontation: Rapid head movements, aggressive gestures, camera shake on impact

jamie_voice.style: Soft, hesitant, breathy when stressed, firm when defiant

pipeline_execution_steps.name: SYNOPSIS_EXPANSION
pipeline_execution_steps.action: Expand into 5-7 key narrative beats using SERIES_BIBLE context

pipeline_execution_steps.name: SCENE_BREAKDOWN
pipeline_execution_steps.action: Convert beats into specific scenes with location and character tags

pipeline_execution_steps.name: SHOT_LIST_GENERATION
pipeline_execution_steps.action: Define camera angles, lighting presets (from PRODUCTION_RULES), and movement for each shot

pipeline_execution_steps.name: PROMPT_ENGINEERING
pipeline_execution_steps.action: Generate final Image and Video prompts using MASTER_PROMPT templates

pipeline_execution_steps.name: AUDIO_SCRIPTING
pipeline_execution_steps.action: Extract dialogue for Voice AI and describe SFX/Foley for Audio layer

continuity_checklist: Prop placement verification (e.g., broken glass in Ep 4 must remain if scene continues)
